DRAFT CONTRACT

Between: Test Procurement Agency (Customer)
And: [Supplier/Contractor Name]

1. Subject: Supply and delivery of industrial control equipment per specification.
2. Contract Value: [to be determined based on winning bid].
3. Payment: Customer pays within 30 business days after signing acceptance certificate.
4. Delivery: Within 45 calendar days from contract signing.
5. Warranty: 24 months from acceptance certificate date.
6. Penalties: 1/300 of key rate per day of delay, capped at 30% of contract value.
7. Contract Security: 30% of contract value, to be returned 60 days after warranty expiry.
8. Termination: Customer may terminate unilaterally if supplier delays beyond 20 days.
9. Acceptance: Formal acceptance committee with protocol.
10. Dispute Resolution: Arbitration at Chamber of Commerce and Industry.
11. Governing Law: Laws of the Russian Federation.
12. Confidentiality: 5 years from contract signing.
13. Force Majeure: Standard definition, documented per Russian Civil Code.
